Subject: Farewell and Best Wishes

Dear Team,

As I prepare to embark on a new chapter in my career, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for the support and camaraderie we've shared. Working alongside such talented individuals has been a truly rewarding experience, and I will cherish the memories we've created together. I will miss our daily interactions and the collaborative spirit that makes this team so special. Please stay in touch, and I wish you all continued success in your endeavors. Thank you for everything!

Warm regards,  
[Your Name]
